name: Almond Cookies- Chinese-American
recipeIngredient: 8 tablespoons unsalted butter, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. In a large bowl, cream together the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
3. Add the egg, almond extract, and ground almonds; mix well.
4. Combine the dry ingredients (flour, baking powder, salt) in another bowl.
5. Gradually add the dry mixture to the butter mixture, stirring until just combined—do not over mix.
6. Form the dough into a log about 12 inches long, then cut into 16 even pieces.
7. Roll each piece into a ball and flatten slightly.
8. Place on a baking tray and brush with egg wash.
9. Bake for 15 minutes or until golden brown.
